question: Scenario: A retail organization is planning a new initiative. Scenario: A team is planning work in the area of prepare data. Which approach best meets the requirement?
options: A. connect to and transform data by using Power Query
B. profile data and set appropriate data types
C. build visuals before cleaning data
D. treat every source as already clean
explanation: The primary objective is to connect to and transform data by using Power Query. Profile data and set appropriate data types is an important complementary practice.

options: A. build visuals before cleaning data
